notes.initialize: Handled internally by the runtime adapter; not intended for browser exposure.
notes.thread/loaded/list: Bootstrap and cached summaries expose a subset of this capability but not a dedicated request.
notes.model/list: Model options are available through bootstrap and settings flows, but not yet as a dedicated app-level call.
notes.config/batchWrite: The capability-plane request is exposed through the runtime and workbench service, but there is not yet a first-class web UI that drives batch writes directly.
notes.config/read: Bootstrap and settings expose a subset of runtime config, but not the full config surface.
notes.getConversationSummary: Supported through conversation.summary.read and shown as a thread-level helper in the current conversation context.
notes.gitDiffToRemote: Supported through git.diffToRemote and surfaced inside the existing Git review context.
notes.getAuthStatus: Bootstrap includes auth state, but not through a dedicated capability-plane request.
notes.error: Runtime status and lastError capture some failures, but not the full raw error notification surface.
notes.mcpServer/oauthLogin/completed: The UI refreshes integrations after login, but there is no dedicated completion event yet.
notes.rawResponseItem/completed: Implemented through the existing timeline.item path, so it is supported as a first-class timeline entry but still grouped under the generic timeline event surface.
notes.item/commandExecution/terminalInteractio: Implemented through the existing timeline.item path, so it is supported as a first-class timeline entry but still grouped under the generic timeline event surface.
notes.experimentalFeature/list: Deferred to wave 2 long-tail capability work.
notes.feedback/upload: Deferred to wave 2 long-tail capability work.
notes.windowsSandbox/setupStart: Deferred to wave 2 because Windows-host-specific sandbox setup is outside the first-wave desktop parity scope.
notes.thread/realtime/started: Realtime sessions are now surfaced through dedicated app-level notifications and a first-class panel, but WebCLI still does not expose a start/stop request or restore sessions after reload.
notes.thread/realtime/itemAdded: Realtime transcript items are rendered in a first-class panel, but still depend on backend-pushed realtime sessions rather than an app-level start request.
notes.thread/realtime/outputAudio/delta: Realtime audio chunks are decoded and played through a WAV blob in the browser, but session playback remains ephemeral and tied to backend-pushed realtime sessions.
notes.thread/realtime/error: Realtime error states are surfaced in the dedicated realtime panel, but the overall capability remains partial until start/stop and reload recovery are exposed.
notes.thread/realtime/closed: Realtime close states are surfaced in the dedicated realtime panel, but the capability remains partial until start/stop and reload recovery are exposed.
notes.windows/worldWritableWarning: Deferred to wave 2 because Windows-host-specific warnings are outside the first-wave desktop parity scope.
notes.windowsSandbox/setupCompleted: Deferred to wave 2 because Windows-host-specific sandbox setup is outside the first-wave desktop parity scope.
